---
title: "Psycho in Hagen - Mitschriften"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "m2_home.qmd"
    - "m4_home.qmd" 
  type: grid
  categories: true
  fields: [image]
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: "250px"
---

<style>
.quarto-listing-container-grid .card-img-top {
  object-fit: contain !important;
}
</style>
